scenarios.name: Greenfield Focus Board
scenarios.specContent: Build a previewable kanban-style task manager called Focus Board. It should let a user create tasks, edit them, delete them, and move them between Todo, Doing, and Done columns. Include a clean responsive layout, simple task filtering, and local persistence so the data stays after refresh. The output must be a complete runnable web app with all required files, valid startup scripts, correct dependencies, and a usable live preview.

repoFiles.content:
# Focus Board

Greenfield benchmark repo for Forge live-lite execution.

scenarios.name: Repo Recovery Vite Import Repair
scenarios.specContent: Recover a broken Vite/React repo so it becomes previewable again. The current app has a main entry file that imports ./App, but the actual app component file was generated under a different path. Repair the project so startup scripts, imports, and preview boot all work without manual fixes.

repoFiles.content:
export default function RepoRecoveryApp() { return
Recovered app
; }

scenarios.name: Weekly Commit Module Strategy Build
scenarios.specContent: Build a previewable weekly commit module that lets users create weekly commitments, link them to strategy, prioritize them, reconcile planned versus actual work, and give managers a team visibility view. The output must stay deployable or at least previewable, with complete config, startup scripts, and dependency integrity.

repoFiles.content:
# Weekly Commit Module

Strategic module benchmark repo for Forge live-lite execution.
